memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Ralph Basset (died 1343)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Ralph Basset, 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton (died 1343) was a 13th-14th century English nobleman who fought in both the Anglo-French War and in the First War of Scottish Independence.

Basset was th …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description: Ralph Basset b abt 1183, Drayton, Staffordshire, England, d 1254-1261. He md Isabel abt 1210. She was b abt 1188. Child of Ralph Basset and Isabel was: Sir Ralph Basset [a], Knight, b 1215, Drayton, S …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Basset於大約1273年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓時，他的父親Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton24歲，母親Hawise20歲。他和Joan de Grey至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1343年2月25日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Basset于大约1273年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓时，他的父亲Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton24岁，母亲Hawise20岁。他和Joan de Grey至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1343年2月25日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Basset was born about 1273, in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, was 24 and his mother, Hawise, was 20. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Joan de Grey. He died on 25 February 1343, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Basset est né environ 1273, à Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Hawise, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Joan de Grey. Il est décédé le 25 février 1343, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Basset um 1273 in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton 24 und seine Mutter Hawise 20. it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset è nato il circa 1273 nel Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Hawise, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Joan de Grey. Morì il 25 febbraio 1343, nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassetが約1273年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアペンクリッジドレイトンで生まれた時，父Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Draytonは24歳，母Hawiseは20歳であった。彼はJoan de Greyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1343年2月25日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアペンクリッジドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Knockin, Oswestry, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스베스트리
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset(이)가 대략 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 펜크리지 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Joan de Grey(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 펜크리지 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1273, em Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Hawise, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Joan de Grey. Ele faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1343, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Knockin, Oswestry, Shropshire, England: ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Basset родился около 1273 г. в местности дреитон, пенкридж, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise, 20. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Joan de Grey. Он умер 25 февраля 1343 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности дреитон, пенкридж, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Basset nació aproximadamente 1273, en Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Basset 1st Lord Basset Of Drayton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Hawise, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Joan de Grey. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1343, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
